title: Tarkin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tarkin''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Tarkin family]]'''
**'''[[Jova Tarkin]]''', paternal grand-uncle to Wilhuff Tarkin
**'''[[Ranulph Tarkin]]''', paternal to to Wilhuff Tarkin
**'''[[Wilhuff Tarkin]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff]]
*'''[[Tarkin Doctrine]]''', a statement given by Wilhuff Tarkin
*'''[[Tarkin Initiative]]''', a secret Imperial think tank part of the [[Imperial Military Department of Advanced Weapons Research]]
**'''[[Tarkin Initiative base]]''', a base of the Iniative
*'''''[[Tarkin's Revenge]]''''', a [[First Order]] [[starfighter]] [[squadron]]
*'''''[[Tarkin's Will]]''''', an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Tarkin family/Legends|'''Tarkin family''']]
**'''[[Garoche Tarkin]]''', an Imperial [[admiral]] 
**'''[[Gideon Tarkin/Legends|Gideon Tarkin]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Brigadier]]
**[[Ranulph Tarkin/Legends|'''Ranulph Tarkin''']], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] for the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]]
**'''[[Rivoche Tarkin]]''', daughter of Gideon Tarkin
**'''[[Shayla Paige-Tarkin]]''', a Galactic Republic senator
**'''[[Thalassa Tarkin]]''', wife of Wilhuff Tarkin
**[[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|'''Wilhuff Tarkin''']], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]]
*'''[[The Agony of Tarkin]]''', an [[Opera/Legends|opera]] performed by the [[Coruscant Opera/Legends|Imperial Opera Company]]
*'''[[Port Tarkin]]''', capital city of the planet [[Phelarion/Legends|Phelarion]].
*'''[[Port Tower Tarkin-12]]''', landing spot on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]
*[[Tarkin (superweapon)|'''''Tarkin''''']], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]
*'''[[Tarkin Detention Facility]]''', an Imperial prison on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]]
*[[Tarkin Doctrine/Legends|'''Tarkin Doctrine''']], a statement given by Wilhuff Tarkin
*'''[[Tarkin's Fang]]''', a secret Imperial base
*'''[[Tarkin's Teeth]]''', an area of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]
*'''[[Tarkin Memorial Conference Center]]''', a building located in [[Eriadu City/Legends|Eriadu City]]
*[[Tarkin (The Star Wars)|'''Tarkin''']], an [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilaean]] religious leader

==Out of universe==
===Canon media===
*[[Tarkin (novel)|'''''Tarkin''''']] {{C|[[Tarkin (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, a [[Canon]] novel by [[James Luceno]]
*'''''[[Age of Rebellion - Grand Moff Tarkin 1]]''''', a one-shot Canon comic in the [[2019]] [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion (comic series)|comic anthology]]

===Legends media===
*'''[[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' (1977) 52: To ''Take The Tarkin'']]''', an issue of the Legends [[1977]] [[Star Wars (1977)|comic series]]

===Other===
*'''[[Tarkin Initiative Labs Skirmish Map]]'''. a skirmish map for the board game [[Star Wars: Imperial Assault]]
*'''[[Tarkin's Top Shelf]]''', a fan podcast that started in [[2016]]
